response.justification: Candidate has strong individual contributor experience (~14 years) with broad full-stack and tooling exposure, but the role requires a people-management track record (2+ years managing people, 3+ years technical leadership) and developer-tools/build-systems specialization within a mobile-platform ecosystem. The resume shows no formal people-management experience, no mobile-platform org leadership, and limited dedicated developer-tools/build-infrastructure work at the scale implied. Workshops and a founder role demonstrate leadership aptitude but not line-management.
strengths: 14+ years software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and tooling
Teaching/workshop experience (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos) signals mentorship ability
Some dev-tools/CI/DevOps exposure (GitLab, CI servers, MCP tooling, test frameworks like Trial/Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-reports experience listed
Lacks mobile-platform ecosystem scale and build-systems focus
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning a team roadmap
